# 📊 Add Advanced Analytics and Reporting Features

**Issue Type:** Enhancement  
**Priority:** Medium  
**Component:** Frontend  
**Labels:** enhancement, frontend, analytics, reporting

## Problem Statement
Current dashboard shows basic metrics. Users need more detailed analytics and reporting capabilities.

## Current Limitations
- Basic charts only
- No custom date ranges
- Missing export functionality
- No comparative analysis

## Proposed Solution
- Add advanced chart types
- Implement custom date range selection
- Add data export features
- Create comparative analysis tools
- Add predictive analytics

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Multiple chart types (candlestick, pie, heatmap)
- [ ] Custom date range picker
- [ ] Export to CSV/PDF functionality
- [ ] Comparative analysis tools
- [ ] Gas optimization predictions
- [ ] Portfolio performance metrics

## Technical Details
- Integrate advanced charting library (Chart.js/D3.js)
- Implement date range picker component
- Add export functionality with proper formatting
- Create comparative analysis algorithms
- Add predictive analytics for gas optimization
- Implement portfolio tracking features

## Impact
Advanced analytics will provide users with better insights for decision-making and portfolio management.

## Additional Notes
Should include real-time data updates and historical trend analysis.
